# Callvix Solutions

> Callvix Solutions is a call answering and appointment booking service built exclusively for pest control companies in the United States. Callvix answers inbound calls under the client's own business name, follows the client's coverage areas, pricing, and call-handling rules, qualifies the pest issue, and books the appointment — functioning as an outsourced back office for the phone.

## Key facts

- Industry served: Pest control companies, United States only.
- Core service: Live call answering, lead qualification, appointment booking, missed-call and after-hours/overflow coverage, and CRM/call-note logging.
- Calls are answered using the client's business name, not "Callvix" or any third-party name.
- Pricing: $399/month base subscription (business-hours live call answering and booking, billed monthly in advance) plus $2.99 per inbound call handled and $0.99 per outbound follow-up call (billed weekly, Monday–Sunday, invoiced the following Monday). Optional add-ons: After-Hours Coverage ($199/month), Weekend Coverage ($149/month), CRM Management ($99/month).
- No long-term contracts — coverage can be added, removed, or cancelled at any time.
- Company stage: Newly launched and currently onboarding its first pest control partners (as of 2026).
- Delivery model: A globally distributed team, including agents based in Cairo, Egypt, trained specifically on pest control terminology and call-handling workflows.
- Contact: contact@callvixsolutions.com | Discovery calls booked via Calendly.

## Pages

- [Home](https://callvixsolutions.com/): Overview of the service and value proposition.
- [Services](https://callvixsolutions.com/services.html): Detailed breakdown of call-handling capabilities and process.
- [Pricing](https://callvixsolutions.com/pricing.html): Base subscription, coverage add-ons, and billing details.
- [Our Approach](https://callvixsolutions.com/about.html): Company background, training model, and delivery approach.
- [FAQ](https://callvixsolutions.com/faq.html): Answers to common questions about how the service works.
- [Contact](https://callvixsolutions.com/contact.html): Contact details and discovery call booking.
